title: FoamCutter
short: Hot wire CNC foam cutter with Arduino motion control and PC interface.
full: A hot wire CNC foam cutter built around an Arduino for motion control. Includes a simple PC interface for sending G-code-like commands. Designed for cutting wing cores and custom packaging inserts.

title: Moving Linear Rail System
short: Lead screw linear rail with DRV8825 and Arduino for repeatable positioning.
full: A lead-screw-driven linear rail using a DRV8825 stepper driver and Arduino. Built for repeatable positioning tasks. Used as a testbed for motion profiling and limit-switch homing routines.

title: DIY Fume Extraction System
short: Shop-built fume extractor with activated carbon filter and task lighting.
full: A shop-built solder fume extractor with an activated carbon filter layer and integrated task lighting. Powered by a quiet DC fan with adjustable speed.

title: ESP32 Weather Station
short: Sensor node with web dashboard and local API logging. Runs outside.
full: An outdoor sensor node measuring temperature and humidity. Serves a local web dashboard and logs readings via a simple REST API. Runs on a small solar-charged battery setup.

title: ESP32 OTA System
short: WiFi firmware updates via ElegantOTA with auth and watchdog recovery.
full: Over-the-air firmware update system using ElegantOTA with basic authentication and a hardware watchdog for recovery. Simplifies field updates without a physical connection.

title: RoyalCore Minecraft Network
short: Java Paper plugin with anti-dupe logic, exploit detection, and Discord alerts.
full: A custom Java Paper plugin featuring anti-dupe logic, exploit detection heuristics, and Discord webhook alerts. Built for a small multiplayer community.

title: Homelab Infrastructure
short: 2 Dell Optiplex servers in PVE cluster, running Jellyfin, Pelican Panel, hosting projects, websites, DBs.
full: Two Dell Optiplex machines clustered with Proxmox VE. They run Jellyfin, Pelican Panel, host several websites, databases, and personal projects behind Cloudflare Tunnels.

title: Custom Electronics Prototyping
short: Arduino and ESP32 experiments with sensors, displays, and motor drivers.
full: Assorted Arduino and ESP32 experiments: sensor breakouts, OLED displays, motor drivers, and communication modules. Used to validate ideas before committing to a PCB.

title: DRV8825 Custom PCB
short: Hand-designed stepper driver board in EasyEDA. Manufactured and soldered.
full: A hand-routed stepper driver breakout board designed in EasyEDA. Manufactured and hand-soldered. Used as a drop-in module for multiple motion projects.

title: mrzsomi.top Portfolio
short: This site. GitHub Pages, Cloudflare, and Formspree for contact. Clean UI.
full: This very site. Hosted on GitHub Pages, fronted by Cloudflare, with a contact form powered by Formspree. Clean responsive design with dark and light themes, particle background, and live GitHub activity.

title: Game Web Assets
short: Web pages and static assets for games and game servers, hosted on GitHub Pages.
full: A centralized web asset repository for game-related projects and server pages. Hosts the main landing page at game.mrzsomi.top, Counter-Strike: Source MOTD pages, and live server status information updated via GitHub Actions. Includes automation workflows that fetch server data and keep pages updated.

title: Status Page
short: Uptime monitor and status page powered by Upptime, tracking service availability.
full: An open-source uptime monitoring and status page for all services, powered by Upptime. Monitors service health 24/7 using GitHub Actions workflows. Provides real-time status, response time graphs, and incident tracking via GitHub issues. Live status page at status.mrzsomi.top.
